title: stelis affinis
intro: Stelis affinis is a species of orchid, commonly found in tropical regions, characterized by its small white flowers and slender stems. The plant has been traditionally used in various herbal remedies, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis affinis are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the roots and stems are boiled or steeped in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed for its medicinal benefits.
